Error.PackIndexNotFound: The compendium pack from which the character class was imported not found in this world
Error.EquipmentSelectionNotViable: Starting Equipment could not be selected because the selected data types do not include starting equipment data.

Dialog.ReloadRequiredContent: This settings change requires Foundry to reload. Would you like to reload now?

AutoAssignSources.Title: Configure Actor Studio Sources
AutoAssignSources.Content: No Actor Studio sources have been assigned. Would you like to auto-assign sources? (You can always amend these later in settings – you will need some sources assigned for Actor Studio to work)
AutoAssignSources.Success: Sources auto-assigned successfully. You can modify them in the Actor Studio settings if needed.
AutoAssignSources.Skipped: Sources not auto-assigned. You can configure them manually in the Actor Studio settings when ready.

Notification.CompendiumSourcesCleaned: Actor Studio cleaned some compendium sources for {type}. Open Sources to review and save changes.
Notification.SettingsSaveFailed: Failed to save settings. Please try again.

LevelUp.ExistingClassesDescription: Click the class you want to level up, or select a class from the Multiclass dropdown to add a new one.
LevelUp.CancelDescription: Click the class button below to cancel the level up selection and return to the start. Or click "Update Character" to apply the changes.
LevelUp.DisabledTooltip: Disabled as advancement is in progress
LevelUp.DisabledDescription: While advancement is in progress, this section is not editable

Permissions.NeedCreateActorError: User requires the 'Create New Actors' permission. Ask your DM to add it to your role
Permissions.NeedCreateItemWarn: User without 'Create New Items' permission. You will not be able to create custom Features
Permissions.NeedFileUploadWarn: User without 'Upload New Files' permission. You might experience issues selecting images
Permissions.NeedFileBrowseWarn: User without 'Use File Browser' permission. You might experience issues selecting images

Welcome.Introduction: Actor Studio is a tool to help you create and level-up your characters for Dungeons and Dragons 5e.
Welcome.Issues: If you have any issues, please report them on
Welcome.Support: If you wish to support the development of this module, please consider a monthly donation via
Welcome.Thanks: Thank you for using Actor Studio!

AllowManualInput.Name: Allow manual input
AllowManualInput.Hint: Allow the user to manually input the ability scores

AllowStandardArray.Name: Allow standard array
AllowStandardArray.Hint: Allow the user to use the standard array

StandardArrayValues.Name: Custom standard array
StandardArrayValues.Hint: Set the custom standard array values (comma separated, e.g. 15, 14, 13, 12, 10, 8)

AllowPointBuy.Name: Allow point buy
AllowPointBuy.Hint: Allow the user to use the point buy system

AllowRolling.Name: Allow rolling
AllowRolling.Hint: Allow the user to roll for the ability scores

PointBuyLimit.Name: Point Buy Limit
PointBuyLimit.Hint: Set the maximum points allowed for the point buy system. Values higher than this threshold will show in red.

AbilityRollFormula.Name: Formula used to roll stats (per stat)

AdvancementCaptureTimerThreshold.Name: Advancement Capture Timer Threshold
AdvancementCaptureTimerThreshold.Hint: Set the threshold for the advancement capture timer. If you find that Race or Background or Class is not being captured for new Actors, make this number higher. This represents the number of milliseconds to wait before the advancement capture is considered to have failed.

debug.Name: Enable debug mode
debug.Hint: Provides additional logging for debugging purposes

debugHooks.Name: Enable extended debugging mode
debugHooks.Hint: Provides additional logging of all Foundry hooks

defaultGoldDice.Name: Default starting gold roll
defaultGoldDice.Hint: Here you can customize the default starting gold dice rolled on the tool, this will be used if the character class does not have a custom starting gold formula

DonationTrackerEnabled.Name: Enable Donation Tracker
DonationTrackerEnabled.Hint: Enable the donation tracker to show the current donation amount and goal

disableAdvancementCapture.Name: Disable Advancement Tab
disableAdvancementCapture.Hint: Prevents advancements from being captured in the Advancements Tab. Instead they will appear as default for the system – i.e. as a dialog popup window. (Note: this is intended for debugging purposes only – there's not much point in using Actor Studio with this disabled.)

forceTakeAverageHitPoints.Name: Force Take Average Hit Points
forceTakeAverageHitPoints.Hint: When enabled, Actor Studio will force the Take Average option during level-up hit point advancements.

DisableOtherActorCreationOptionsForPlaye.Name: Disable other Create Actor button
DisableOtherActorCreationOptionsForPlaye.Hint: Prevents players from creating actors using the standard Create Actor button. Only Actor Studio will be available.

DonationTrackerRank.Name: Rank
DonationTrackerRank.Hint: Enter the folder name for the rank

DonationTracker_UnregisteredAccess.Name: Unregistered Access
DonationTracker_UnregisteredAccess.Hint: If ticked, unregistered users will have access to anything outside of DT folders in DT linked compendiums

DonationTrackerAction.Name: Add DT folders
DonationTrackerAction.Hint: Add the Donation Tracker membership level folders to this compendium

DonationTracker.Name: Donation Tracker settings
DonationTracker.Label: Edit
DonationTracker.Hint: Enable / Disable the integration, and each donation tracker membership level has a folder name. You can edit them here.

DontShowWelcome.Name: Don't show this message again
DontShowWelcome.Hint: Don't show the welcome application when Foundry first loads. (You can always undo this via Configure Settings).

EnableLevelUp.Name: Enable Level Up
EnableLevelUp.Hint: Check this to include a button on the character sheet for leveling up via Actor Studio

FilterPackSourcesAppropriatelyByName.Name: Filter Pack Sources Appropriately by Name
FilterPackSourcesAppropriatelyByName.Hint: If enabled, the Source sections will only include packs that have a name, path, id, or label that matches the source type. E.g. a spell items compendium titled 'Spell emporium' would be shown in the Spells sources section but not in other sources sections.

forceDnd5eLevelUpAutomation.Name: Force D&D5e Level Up Automation
forceDnd5eLevelUpAutomation.Hint: Without this the Actor Studio is pretty much useless other that for previewing options as it won't be able to apply the changes to the actor

milestoneLeveling.Name: Milestone Levelling
milestoneLeveling.Hint: If unchecked, the Level Up button will only be shown when the Actor has sufficient XP to level up. If checked, the button will always be shown and the user will be able to level up without having the required XP.

ShowRolls.Name: Show rolls on chat
ShowRolls.Hint: Show ability score, hp per level and starting gold rolls as chat messages

showButtonInSideBar.Name: Show button in sidebar
showButtonInSideBar.Hint: Show the Actor Studio button in the sidebar. (Requires a browser refresh to take effect)

illuminatedDescription.Name: Enable illuminated description
illuminatedDescription.Hint: This will add a larger version of the selection icons to the right-hand panel of the tab, where appropriate.

illuminatedHeight.Name: Illuminated height
illuminatedHeight.Hint: Set the height of the illuminated description

illuminatedWidth.Name: Illuminated width
illuminatedWidth.Hint: Set the width of the illuminated description

IndividualPanelScroll.Name: Individual panel scrolls
IndividualPanelScroll.Hint: In tabs with left and right panels, make each side have independent scrolls

UseTokenizer.Name: Use Tokenizer if available
UseTokenizer.Hint: The tool will try to use the Tokenizer module, if found, as default to generate avatar and token pictures

EquipmentBlacklist.Name: Equipment Blacklist
EquipmentBlacklist.Hint: Items (Equipment) not shown for purchase, by name (case-sensitive, separated by ';', spaces are ok). Only 'common' rarity items are shown, but this list excludes the few magical/unreasonable common items. Default - 'Potion of Climbing; Potion of Healing; Spell Scroll 1st Level; Spell Scroll Cantrip Level; Unarmed Strike'

ShowPackLabelInSelect.Name: Show Compendium Label in Select
ShowPackLabelInSelect.Hint: Show the pack label along with the item label in the select options

SubraceNameBlacklist.Name: Subrace Names Blacklist
SubraceNameBlacklist.Hint: Items excluded by name from been Subraces (case-sensitive, separated by ';', spaces are ok). Used by default to exclude things like Gnome Cunning from registering as Gnome subclasses. Default - 'Gnome Cunning; Halfling Nimbleness'

ButtonOnDialogInsteadOfActorsDirectory.Name: Create Actor dialog button
ButtonOnDialogInsteadOfActorsDirectory.Hint: If the button interferes with other modules, or you prefer the aesthetic of having a single 'create actor' button to not confuse your players

NonGmsCanOnlyCreatePCs.Name: Non-GMs can only create PCs
NonGmsCanOnlyCreatePCs.Hint: If enabled, non-GMs will only be able to create Player Characters, not other actor types

WindowX.Name: Actor Studio application window width
WindowX.Hint: Set the initial width for the window here

WindowY.Name: Actor Studio application window height
WindowY.Hint: Set the initial height for the window here

Sources.Name: Compendium Sources
Sources.Hint: Select the compendia that will serve as data source for the different creation steps
Sources.Label: Select sources

TrimSubclasses.Name: Trim Subclass names
TrimSubclasses.Hint: Shows subclass names without any last part in parenthesis, mostly for DDBImporter subclasses like 'Assassin (Rogue)' to be just 'Assassin' (does NOT modify the items added to actor, just show they are shown in the tool)

EnableEquipmentSelection.Name: Enable Equipment Selection
EnableEquipmentSelection.Hint: Allows players to select their starting equipment during character creation. If disabled, equipment will need to be added manually after creation.

EnableEquipmentPurchase.Name: Enable Equipment Purchase
EnableEquipmentPurchase.Hint: If enabled, adds a 'Shop' tab after equipment selection for characters who received starting gold, allowing them to purchase items from designated compendiums. Note that if Equipment Selection is disabled, this setting is ignored.

ExperimentalCharacterNameStyling.Name: Experimental Character Name Styling
ExperimentalCharacterNameStyling.Hint: Enable experimental animated character name styling with random colors and fonts. This is an experimental feature that adds visual flair to the character name input.

AllowAbilityRollScoresToBeMoved.Name: Allow rolled ability scores to be moved
AllowAbilityRollScoresToBeMoved.Hint: If enabled, rolled abilities can be moved; similar to how Standard Array works.

EnableSpellSelection.Name: Enable Spell Selection
EnableSpellSelection.Hint: Allows players to select their spells during character creation. If disabled, spells will need to be added manually after creation.

EnableCustomSpellListFiltering.Name: Spells that are not assigned to any character class will be available to all characters.
EnableCustomSpellListFiltering.Hint: If enabled, spells can match custom spell-list flags and spells without class assignments are included. If disabled, only spells explicitly assigned to the selected class/subclass are shown.

ShowLevelPreviewDropdown.Name: Show Level Preview Dropdown
ShowLevelPreviewDropdown.Hint: If enabled, shows a level preview dropdown in the Class tab that allows users to preview advancements at different levels. If disabled, the dropdown will be hidden to avoid confusion about creating higher level characters.

HideAdvancementList.Name: Hide left panel for Backgrounds, Origins and Classes
HideAdvancementList.Hint: If enabled, hides the left panel of the Background, Origins and Class tabs. The dropdown selectors remain visible. The blank area is filled with the relevant item description.

CharacterCreationTabOrder.Name: Character Creation Tab Order
CharacterCreationTabOrder.Hint: Set the order for the four core character creation tabs (Abilities, Race, Background, Class).
CharacterCreationTabOrder.Title: Character Creation Tab Order

EnableLLMNameGeneration.Name: Enable LLM Name Generation
EnableLLMNameGeneration.Hint: If enabled, adds a ChatGPT button next to the character name input that generates fantasy-appropriate names based on the selected race.

EnableBiographyTab.Name: Enable Biography Tab
EnableBiographyTab.Hint: Show the Biography tab during character creation. If enabled, Biography will be shown even if LLM name generation or the license tracker are disabled; the Generate button will hide when generation isn't available.

EnableLicenseTracker.Name: Enable License Tracker
EnableLicenseTracker.Hint: If enabled, requires a license key for LLM name generation. The license key must be entered below.

AardvarkLicenseCode.Name: Aardvark License Code
AardvarkLicenseCode.Hint: Enter your Aardvark license code for LLM name generation. This is required when license tracking is enabled.

LLMApiKey.Name: LLM API Key
LLMApiKey.Hint: API key for the LLM service. Leave as default for OpenAI (built-in service). For Claude, enter your Anthropic API key. For OpenRouter, enter your OpenRouter API key.

LLMProvider.Name: LLM Provider
LLMProvider.Hint: Select which LLM provider to use for name generation. OpenAI uses the built-in service (no API key needed). Claude requires an Anthropic API key. OpenRouter requires an OpenRouter API key.

AbilityScores.Name: Ability Scores
AbilityScores.Hint: Configure how players can enter ability scores during character creation
AbilityScores.Label: Configure ability scores
AbilityScores.Title: Ability Scores Configuration
AbilityScores.Description: Choose which methods players can use to determine their ability scores

Equipment.Name: Equipment & Gold
Equipment.Hint: Configure starting gold and equipment/spell selection options
Equipment.Label: Configure equipment & gold
Equipment.Title: Equipment & Gold Configuration
Equipment.Description: Set starting gold and enable equipment/spell selection features

Spell.Name: Spells
Spell.Hint: Configure spell selection and custom spell list behavior
Spell.Label: Configure spells
Spell.Title: Spell Configuration
Spell.Description: Control spell selection and custom spell list features

CustomSpellLists.Name: Custom Spell Lists
CustomSpellLists.Hint: Create and edit custom spell lists used for spell filtering.
CustomSpellLists.Label: Manage Spell Lists
CustomSpellLists.MenuHint: Open the Spell List Manager to create and edit custom lists.

Progression.Name: Progression
Progression.Label: Configure progression
Progression.Title: Progression Configuration
Progression.Description: Configure level-up behavior and advancement capture settings

UI.Name: UI & Window
UI.Hint: Configure window dimensions and UI display options
UI.Label: Configure UI & window
UI.Title: UI & Window Configuration
UI.Description: Customize the appearance and dimensions of the Actor Studio window

AccessControl.Name: Access Control
AccessControl.Hint: Configure player permissions for character creation
AccessControl.Label: Configure access control
AccessControl.Title: Access Control Configuration
AccessControl.Description: Control what actions players can perform when creating characters

CompendiumDisplay.Name: Compendium Display
CompendiumDisplay.Hint: Configure how compendia are displayed and filtered
CompendiumDisplay.Label: Configure compendium display
CompendiumDisplay.Title: Compendium Display Configuration
CompendiumDisplay.Description: Control how compendium packs are shown in selection lists

Diagnostics.Name: Diagnostics
Diagnostics.Label: Configure diagnostics
Diagnostics.Title: Diagnostics Configuration
Diagnostics.Description: Enable debug logging and diagnostic features

testTimeoutUiInteraction.Name: UI interaction timeout (ms)
testTimeoutUiInteraction.Hint: Timeout for general UI interactions like button clicks and tab switches

testTimeoutUiStateChange.Name: UI state change timeout (ms)
testTimeoutUiStateChange.Hint: Timeout for UI state changes like app opening, tab activation, or form updates

testTimeoutSpellUiLoad.Name: Spell UI load timeout (ms)
testTimeoutSpellUiLoad.Hint: Timeout for spell-related UI elements to load and become interactive

testTimeoutSpellWorkflow.Name: Spell workflow timeout (ms)
testTimeoutSpellWorkflow.Hint: Timeout for complete spell selection workflows including finalization

testTimeoutAppClosure.Name: App closure timeout (ms)
testTimeoutAppClosure.Hint: Timeout for application windows to close completely

testTimeoutAppLifecycleComplete.Name: App lifecycle complete timeout (ms)
testTimeoutAppLifecycleComplete.Hint: Timeout for complete application lifecycle including creation and cleanup

testTimeoutAdvancementProcessing.Name: Advancement processing timeout (ms)
testTimeoutAdvancementProcessing.Hint: Timeout for advancement processing and automation steps

testTimeoutAdvancementPostLevel.Name: Advancement post-level timeout (ms)
testTimeoutAdvancementPostLevel.Hint: Timeout for post-level advancement operations and state updates

testTimeoutActorDataUpdate.Name: Actor data update timeout (ms)
testTimeoutActorDataUpdate.Hint: Timeout for actor data updates and persistence operations

testIntervalPolling.Name: Polling interval (ms)
testIntervalPolling.Hint: Time between polls when waiting for conditions

SpellListManager.NoSpellLists: No spell lists yet. Click "New List" to create one.
SpellListManager.Name: Name
SpellListManager.DragPlaceholder: Drag spells or entire compendiums from the sidebar to add them here
SpellListManager.SelectListMessage: Select a spell list from the left panel to edit it
SpellListManager.SavedNotification: Spell lists saved. Reload the world to apply changes to spell filtering.
SpellListManager.AllSpellsAlreadyInList: All spells from "{pack}" are already in this list.

Equipment.Label: Equipment
Equipment.EquipmentConfirmed: Equipment has been confirmed and now resides on the character sheet
Equipment.EquipmentReadOnly: Equipment selections have been completed and are now read-only during advancement selection
Equipment.SelectOne: Select one of the following options:

Shop.PurchaseCompleted: Equipment purchases have been completed and finalized
Shop.ShopReadOnly: Shop selections have been completed and are now read-only
Shop.NoEquipment: No equipment available. Please check your compendium sources in the module settings.
Shop.ErrorItemNoId: Failed to add item to cart: Missing item id
Shop.ErrorAddToCart: Failed to add item to cart
Shop.ErrorRemoveFromCart: Failed to remove item from cart
Shop.FilterPlaceholder: Search items in the shop by keyword

Spells.NoSpells: No spells available. Please check your compendium sources in the module settings.
Spells.SpellsReadOnly: Spell selections have been completed and are now read-only
Spells.CantripLimitReached: You have reached the maximum number of cantrips for your level and class.
Spells.SpellLimitReached: You have reached the maximum number of spells for your level and class.

FeatSpells.Title: Feat Spell Selection
FeatSpells.Description: Some of your feats grant access to additional spells. Please select the required spells for each feat.
FeatSpells.NoRequirements: No feat spell selections are required.
FeatSpells.ManualReview: This feat requires manual review. Please add the spells manually after completing the level-up process.

FeatSelector.Title: Select a Feat
FeatSelector.NoFeats: No feats available. Check your compendium sources in settings.
